summary: Onboarding Wizard & Extended Company Profile - All tests passed. Backend: 10/10 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified working correctly for RDC (4 steps, no SFEC) and Congo (5 steps, optional SFEC). Responsive design working at mobile (390px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1920px).

issues: Wizard defaults to Congo (CG) instead of detecting user's existing country from company data. User must manually select their country on step 1. This is a UX improvement suggestion, not a bug.

action_items: OPTIONAL UX IMPROVEMENT: Initialize OnboardingWizard country selection based on user's existing company.country value instead of defaulting to CG
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/company/onboarding accepts empty fiscalizationApiKey for RDC (CD)
VERIFIED: POST /api/company/onboarding accepts empty fiscalizationApiKey for Congo (CG) - SFEC is optional
VERIFIED: POST /api/company/onboarding rejects fiscalizationApiKey < 16 chars for Congo (CG)
VERIFIED: POST /api/company/onboarding persists all new fields: legalForm, capital, representativeName, representativeRole, cnssEmployerRate, cnssEmployeeRate
VERIFIED: PUT /api/company updates all new extended fields correctly
VERIFIED: GET /api/company returns hasFiscalizationKey flag (not raw key)
VERIFIED: RDC wizard shows 4 steps (no SFEC step)
VERIFIED: Congo wizard shows 5 steps with optional SFEC step
VERIFIED: 'Sauter cette étape' (Skip) button visible when SFEC key is empty
VERIFIED: Settings page shows all new fields: Forme juridique, Capital, Représentant légal, Qualité du représentant, CNSS patronale %, CNSS salariale %
VERIFIED: Responsive mobile (390px): sidebar hidden, hamburger menu, 1-column forms
VERIFIED: Responsive tablet (768px): sidebar hidden, 2-column forms
VERIFIED: Onboarding wizard usable on mobile (scrollable, buttons accessible)
REGRESSION PASSED: RDC localization still working (+243 dial code, CDF/USD currency)

test_credentials.congo_user: designer@tbi-center.fr / admin (country=CG, currency=XAF, onboardingCompleted=false for testing)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo companies with onboarding reset via direct DB queries
context_for_next_testing_agent: Onboarding wizard fully tested for both RDC (4 steps) and Congo (5 steps). All new extended company profile fields working. Responsive design verified at mobile/tablet/desktop. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_onboarding.py. Note: After testing, the ariane.mbombo and designer accounts may have onboardingCompleted=true - reset them if needed for future onboarding tests.

frontend_tests.test: RDC Onboarding - Submit without SFEC key
Congo Onboarding - Skip SFEC button visible
Congo Onboarding - Skip SFEC flow works

mobile_390px.sidebar: Hidden by default, opens as drawer via hamburger menu
